---
name: User Story
about: Create a user story for a new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: feature
assignees: ''

---

## User Story
**As a** [persona]  
**I want** [action/feature]  
**So that** [benefit/value]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Given [context]
- [ ] When [action]
- [ ] Then [expected outcome]

## Technical Notes
<!-- Any technical considerations, implementation approach, or constraints -->

## Story Points
<!-- Estimate: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21 -->

## Sprint
<!-- Sprint number: Sprint 1, Sprint 2, etc. -->

## Dependencies
<!-- List any dependencies -->
- Depends on: #
- Blocks: #

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code written and reviewed
- [ ] Unit tests written (>80% coverage)
- [ ] Integration tests passed
- [ ] UI/UX reviewed by designer
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Deployed to staging
- [ ] Product owner approval
